sections.h:
List the elements of the offence Record the relevant evidence against each element of the offence paying consideration to Physical Material, Witnesses and Suspects. Where applicable, the following is to be recorded after the name of the witness or suspect: (s) – statement has been obtained; (ns) – statement has not been obtained; (n) – notes were taken; (AVROI) – audiovisual record of interview was conducted.

PLACE 25 Ocean Drive, Scarborough.

Evidence establishing the Evidence of LEACH (s) (para 4), HATCH (n), LONG (ns) and SMITH (s) (para Endorsed location of the offence 9).

DATE 28 January 2011

Evidence establishing the date of Evidence of LEACH (s) (para 4), HATCH (n), LONG (ns) and SMITH (s) (para Endorsed the offence 5).

ANY PERSON Blake Rebel WILLIAMS

Evidence that assists to identify Evidence of LEACH (s) (para 6) who identified the suspect at the scene. Endorsed the accused as the person that Evidence of 1/C GREY (n) and PC WHITE (n) of admissions by the suspect that committed the offence he punched LEACH.

Evidence of LEACH (s) (para 27) that the suspect had no lawful reason to Endorsed Unlawfully- assault him.

There is no evidence to suggest that the alleged assault was authorised, justified or excused by law as defined in Section 223 Criminal Code.

Evidence of LEACH (s) (para 11) that the suspect grabbed him around the neck Endorsed and squeezed his throat and punched him with a right fist to his left eye socket.

Evidence of HATCH (n), LONG (ns), and SMITH (s) (para 13) corroborates the above.

Assaulted- Evidence of First Aid Officer GREEN (s) (para 7) that the suspect apologised to LEACH in the First Aid tent regarding hitting him.

Evidence of 1/C GREY (n) and PC WHITE (n) that the suspect admitted punching LEACH.

The alleged punch to the victims face constitutes an assault as defined in Section 222 Criminal Code.

Another- James Alexander LEACH Endorsed

Evidence of LEACH (s) (para 11) that he is the victim of the assault causing bodily harm.

Evidence of LEACH (s) (para 12) that the punch caused his injury being a Endorsed fractured eye socket and bruising.

Evidence of PC BOBBY (n) who will produce photographs of LEACH's injuries.

Did Bodily Harm- Evidence of Doctor SMITH (ns) who will provide a medical report of the injury (not yet obtained).

The injury received interfered with the health and comfort of LEACH (s) (para

15) and constitutes 'bodily harm' as defined in Section 1 Criminal Code
